title: Metaplex protocol
summary: Complete Metaplex Protocol guide for Solana NFTs and digital assets.
author: metaplex-foundation

landingGuidance.title: Protocol Fees
landingGuidance.content:
| Program | Operation | Fee |
|---------|-----------|-----|
| **Core** | Create | 0.0015 SOL |
| **Core** | Execute | 0.00004872 SOL |
| **Token Metadata** | Create | 0.01 SOL |
| **Bubblegum v2** | Create | 0.00009 SOL |
| **Bubblegum v2** | Transfer | 0.000006 SOL |
| **Bubblegum v1** | Create | Free |
| **Genesis** | Launch Pool | 2% deposit/withdraw, 5% graduation |
| **Genesis** | Presale | 2% deposit, 5% graduation |
| **MPL-Hybrid** | Swap | 0.005 SOL |

---

failureHandling.title: Fallback handling
failureHandling.content:
- Validate signer assumptions, addresses, and environment variables before retrying.
- Simulate or use read-only verification paths before broadcasting changed transactions.
- Escalate to the protocol's troubleshooting docs when behavior differs from the expected flow.
